scripts.nx: NX_DAEMON=false TMPDIR=/tmp TEMP=/tmp TMP=/tmp corepack pnpm exec nx
scripts.build: NX_DAEMON=false TMPDIR=/tmp TEMP=/tmp TMP=/tmp corepack pnpm exec nx run-many -t build
scripts.check: NX_DAEMON=false TMPDIR=/tmp TEMP=/tmp TMP=/tmp corepack pnpm exec nx run workspace:check
scripts.generate: NX_DAEMON=false TMPDIR=/tmp TEMP=/tmp TMP=/tmp corepack pnpm exec nx run joern-effect:generate
scripts.check-generated: NX_DAEMON=false TMPDIR=/tmp TEMP=/tmp TMP=/tmp corepack pnpm exec nx run joern-effect:check-generated
scripts.lint: NX_DAEMON=false TMPDIR=/tmp TEMP=/tmp TMP=/tmp corepack pnpm exec nx run-many -t lint --all
scripts.property: NX_DAEMON=false TMPDIR=/tmp TEMP=/tmp TMP=/tmp corepack pnpm exec nx run joern-effect-properties:property
scripts.property:joern: NX_DAEMON=false TMPDIR=/tmp TEMP=/tmp TMP=/tmp corepack pnpm exec nx run joern-effect-properties:property-joern
